title: One More
lyrics:
[verse 1]
My Lego tower’s tall—*clink!*
Dog just stole my toast—*splat!*
Book’s still open, wait, don’t blink!
Mom said "three"—I missed that!

[chorus]
One more minute, one more try
One more story, don’t say bye
One more second, hold the light
One More!

[verse 2]
Socks are lost—*whoosh!*—goodbye
Juice box drips—*plop!*—oh my
Cat’s asleep, I poke—*psst!*
Moon’s still up, it winked—*twink!*

[chorus]
One more minute, one more try
One more story, don’t say bye
One more second, hold the light
One More!

[ending]
One more whisper, one last sigh
One more hug… then close my eyes.
style_prompt: Catchy children's song, guitar and drums, 115 BPM, groovy beat, warm clear vocal, every word easy to understand, fun and bouncy, not fast
scene: The living room rug is littered with LEGO bricks, the TV hums with the *Minecraft* end-screen music at 7:17 PM, and Mom just sighed, "Okay, *last* bedtime story." You clutch the spine of *Dog Man* tighter, knees digging into the couch cushions, and yell, "ONE MORE!
cover_description: Kid clutches book, LEGO tower wobbles, juice box tips—*plop!*
